POST-LAB 1 QUESTIONS (2 points) Last Name: _______________________ First Name: _______________________ 1. Give the name of the anatomical region to which each of the following structures belongs. (0.5 points) a. Elbow b. Back of the knee c. Belly button d. Heel e. Back of the neck 2. Determine which body plane is described by each of the following scenarios. (0.5 points) a. If the human body were split into left and right halves. b. If the human body were split into anterior and posterior halves. c. If the human body were split into superior and inferior halves 3. There are nine abdominal regions. Name the three consecutive regions that run down the center of the abdomen. (
